compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
advertise Titan's inclusive fit, no commas
response: Discover Titan's inclusive fit where style meets comfort. Our clothing is designed for large men ensuring a perfect fit every time. Say goodbye to ill-fitting clothes and hello to confidence. With a wide range of sizes and styles Titan has something for everyone. Join the Titan family and experience the difference of truly inclusive fashion.
